data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for booking-time signature or pre-check-in signature.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Booking-time signature or pre-check-in signature', but there is no direct evidence provided in the prior steps or linked use cases that confirms its implementation or existence. While the linked use case mentions the need for such signatures, the absence of any evidence related to their validation indicates a gap in the requirement coverage. Therefore, the validation step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence.
gaps: No evidence of booking-time signature or pre-check-in signature being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
